text: Lymph nodes are immune checkpoints where cells meet antigens. These tiny structures might seem small, but they’re essential in our defense. When pathogens invade, lymph nodes spring into action, gathering immune cells. Research shows they can influence how effectively our immune system responds. So, next time you feel under the weather, remember the unseen battle within. Curious about more science insights? Hit that follow button!
